title: Dichodon anomalum

This family is part of the suborder Sphenacodontia, which includes several groups of extinct synapsids. The order Sphenacodontia is a part of the larger group Therapsida, which is a subgroup of the class Synapsida. Synapsida is a clade that also includes mammals, but is distinct from them due to the presence of a single temporal fenestra. This classification places Dichodon anomalum within the broader group of mammal-like reptiles.
